summary: Iteration 5 testing complete - All new features verified. Fixed billing checkout bug. 22/22 backend tests passed, all frontend features working including Analytics tab with 4 charts, Landing page with 3 pricing cards, Settings with email notifications.

bugs_fixed.issue: Billing checkout endpoint had invalid Depends() causing validation error
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed `request: Any = Depends()` parameter from create_checkout function

seed_data_creation: Created test email subscribers and test auth users during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 5 working correctly. Frontend uses Supabase for data display (comment_reports, dm_reports, post_reports tables). Backend uses MongoDB for auth and billing endpoints. Stripe integration is working with test key. Email notifications use Resend with placeholder key (send-summary returns 503 as expected). DMs and Posts Supabase tables may be empty.

backend_api: POST /api/billing/checkout - returns Stripe URL for pro/enterprise plans
POST /api/notifications/subscribe - subscribes email with daily/weekly frequency
POST /api/auth/register - creates user and returns JWT token
POST /api/auth/login - returns token with valid credentials
frontend_features: Dashboard loads with 6 stat cards (This Month, This Week, Today, All Comments, DMs Sent, Posts Made)
6 tabs visible: Comments, DMs, Posts, Analytics, Live Logs, Settings
Comments tab shows date range filter and reports table
DMs tab shows stats and DM history table (empty state handled)
Posts tab shows stats and post history table (empty state handled)
Analytics tab shows 4 metric cards (Total Comments, Active Profiles, Avg per Profile, Peak Hour)
Analytics tab shows 4 charts (Trend, Hourly, Brand Pie, Profile Bar)
Live Logs tab shows automation logs container with Idle/Running status
Settings tab has email notification subscription form with subscribe button
Settings tab has billing section showing Free plan with upgrade button
Back arrow navigates to Landing page
Landing page hero section with 'Automate Your TikTok Growth' title
Landing page has 3 pricing cards (Free $0, Pro $29, Enterprise $99)
View Dashboard button navigates to dashboard
See Pricing button scrolls to pricing section

mocked_integrations.email_sending: Resend API configured with test placeholder key - /api/notifications/send-summary returns 503 (expected)
mocked_integrations.stripe: Stripe test key sk_test_emergent - checkout URLs work correctly

design_review.color_scheme: Dark theme (zinc-950) with excellent contrast - all text readable
design_review.stat_cards: 6 cards with gradient backgrounds and appropriate icons
design_review.tabs: Clean tab navigation with badges showing counts
design_review.analytics_charts: 4 recharts components with proper styling and tooltips
design_review.landing_page: Hero section with gradient text, stats banner, 3 pricing cards with features lists
design_review.settings: Email subscription form with subscriber list, billing section with upgrade button
